name: Grid
summary: A background grid pattern component creating a subtle dot or line grid with radial gradient fade, perfect for technical, developer-focused interfaces and dark-themed designs.
detailedDescription: The Grid component creates a refined background pattern featuring a precise grid of dots or lines that fade toward the edges through a radial gradient mask. This effect produces a technical, architectural aesthetic reminiscent of blueprint paper or graph paper. The grid uses CSS mask-image with radial-gradient to create the fade effect, making the center more visible while edges dissolve into the background. The component works particularly well in dark mode with light grid lines, creating strong contrast and visual interest without overwhelming foreground content. Grid spacing, line thickness, and opacity are customizable to achieve anything from subtle texture to bold statement backgrounds. Perfect for developer tools, SaaS dashboards, technical documentation, or any context where conveying precision, structure, and technical sophistication enhances the brand message. The effect adds visual depth to otherwise flat backgrounds while maintaining excellent readability for overlaid content.
purpose: Create technical, structured background patterns with grid visuals
Add subtle depth and texture to flat backgrounds
Support developer-focused and technical brand identities
Provide visual interest without overwhelming content
behavior: Renders precise grid pattern using CSS background utilities
Applies radial gradient mask creating center-focused fade
Works in both light and dark mode contexts
Customizable grid density, colors, and opacity
Provides depth through gradient fade effect
visualCharacteristics: Precise grid pattern creating technical appearance
Radial gradient fade from center to edges
Excellent contrast in dark mode contexts
Blueprint or graph paper visual reference
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
